prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document concerns the RSV vaccine coverage of pregnant women specifically in England and is based on the implementation of a maternal vaccination programme initiated by the UK health authorities. Therefore, it does not apply to Scotland, as public health policies and vaccination programs are managed independently by the Scottish Government.
